overview:
# Pokémon Emerald: The Hollow Crown

## Elevator pitch
You arrive in Hoenn as ancient Johto relics begin surfacing beneath the region's soil. A corporate cult called the Null Syndicate hunts those relics to feed a sleeping horror called the Stillness, and your rival Kael knows their secrets because he once wore their uniform. Train like a fighter, seal what should never wake, and climb from Littleroot to Champion before Sovereign Null reshapes the world into silence.

## Themes
- Power earned through discipline and bonds, not stolen life force
- History buried twice: Johto bells and Hoenn legends as one chained truth
- Horror of erasure — bodies, names, and memory hollowed out for "perfection"

## Protagonist
Default name follows player choice (Brendan/May). Backstory: family relocated from Olivine after your parent witnessed a "hollow ship" dredging the sea floor. Starting goal: settle in Littleroot, win badges, prove yourself to Gym Leader Norman (your father's friend). End goal: break the Null Syndicate's crown seals, restore the Brass Bell trinity, and deny Sovereign Null the Stillness.

## Rival
**Kael** — sharp, proud, obsessed with surpassing you. Early: cocky ex-trainer who left the Syndicate's youth program and hides a branded mark on his wrist. Mid: forced to cooperate when the Syndicate targets his sister in Slateport; grudging respect. Late: stands with you at Sootopolis, admits fear is not weakness, fights Null's lieutenant while you face the sovereign.

## Antagonist / faction
**The Null Syndicate** — merger of Devon poachers, renegade Silph tech, and Johto ruin delvers. Leader: **Sovereign Null** (humanoid, porcelain mask, Frieza-cold politeness), believes the Stillness will grant immortal "perfect silence" by consuming legendary essence. Player opposes them because they hollow Pokémon and people into empty vessels. **Team Magma and Team Aqua are fully replaced** — no weather teams; Mt Chimney and Seafloor Cavern are Syndicate excavation sites.

## Legendaries
Groudon and Kyogre appear as **Seal Keepers** bound at Sootopolis — required for plot climax but not catch-required. Rayquaza descends as **Sky Arbiter** when the Brass Bell shards resonate; story resolution uses Rayquaza to re-chain the Stillness, not a mandatory capture. Optional: player may battle/catch after story flag STILLNESS_SEALED.

## Act structure

| Act | Region progress | Main conflict |
|-----|-----------------|----------------|
| 1 | Littleroot → Stone Badge | Relocation, first Syndicate sighting, Devon theft |
| 2 | → Knuckle Badge | Museum heist, power-scanner plot, Mt Chimney breach |
| 3 | → Dynamo Badge | Norman's truth, Fortree spy, Mt Pyre bell shard |
| 4 | → Heat Badge | Lilycove hideout, Mossdeep launch, cavern descent |
| 5 | → Feather Badge | Sootopolis cataclysm, legendary re-sealing |
| 6 | → Champion | Victory Road trials, Elite Four, homecoming |

## New named NPCs
| Name | Role | First scene file |
|------|------|------------------|
| Kael | Rival, ex-Syndicate | act1-02-clock-rival |
| Sovereign Null | Antagonist | act2-06-mt-chimney-clash |
| Elara Voss | Johto archaeologist | act2-02-slateport-museum |
| Harrow | Null lieutenant | act2-06-mt-chimney-clash |
| Sister Mira | Kael's sister, Slateport nurse | act2-02-slateport-museum |
| Captain Jori | S.S. Tidal ally | act3-06-mossdeep-planning |
| The Stillness | Eldritch sealed entity | act3-04-mt-pyre-lore |

## Tone & content rating
PG-13. Martial arts enthusiasm, cosmic horror undertones (hollow eyes, whispering ruins, body-husk imagery without gore). No explicit content. Frightening scenes use atmosphere and implication, not splatter.

scenes.title: Arrival in Littleroot

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The truck shudders over red Hoenn soil. In the mirror of a puddle, your reflection blinks a half-second late.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: We're home, sweetie. Littleroot Town. Fresh air. Fresh start.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Your father asked Norman to watch over us. That means you train hard, but not foolishly.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: I know Olivine still feels close. Forget the hollow ships. Forget the bells that rang underwater.

dialogue.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue.line: silent

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Go on inside. I'll unpack. And if you hear whispering from the empty room—

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: —that's just the house settling.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Welcome to our new life.

scenes.rawBody:
# Scene: Arrival in Littleroot

## Context
The moving truck arrives in Littleroot after the family fled Olivine's docks. Mom hides her anxiety behind warmth; a distant siren wails once and stops. Replaces vanilla truck intro and house entry. Player has no Pokémon yet.

## Characters
- MOM — welcomes player, hints at why they left Johto
- PLAYER — silent protagonist
- NARRATOR — optional truck bump

## Dialogue

| Speaker | Line | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| NARRATOR | The truck shudders over red Hoenn soil. In the mirror of a puddle, your reflection blinks a half-second late. | horror beat, subtle |
| MOM | We're home, sweetie. Littleroot Town. Fresh air. Fresh start. | warm, tired |
| MOM | Your father asked Norman to watch over us. That means you train hard, but not foolishly. | foreshadow Norman |
| MOM | I know Olivine still feels close. Forget the hollow ships. Forget the bells that rang underwater. | Johto hook |
| PLAYER | | silent |
| MOM | Go on inside. I'll unpack. And if you hear whispering from the empty room— | pause |
| MOM | —that's just the house settling. | Mom lies kindly |
| MOM | Welcome to our new life. | sets tone |

## Story flags / triggers
- Sets VAR_LITTLEROOT_INTRO_STATE = 1 when complete
- Unlocks: house interior, clock scene

## Implementation notes
Play truck arrival animation. Fade to player bedroom. Set global flag MOVED_TO_HOENN. Optional: one-frame static overlay on puddle reflection.

scenes.title: Clock and the Neighbor

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Set the clock, dear. Time only moves forward if we tell it to.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Our neighbors have a boy your age. Kael. Be polite.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: You the import from Johto? Heard your family ran from the coast.

dialogue.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue.line: silent

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: Don't flinch. I left something worse than a bad town.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: They call it training. I call it branding.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: Professor Birch is outside Route 101. Probably dying of boredom. Or of something else.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: Beat me when you're worth measuring.

dialogue.speaker: MOM (if Brendan)
dialogue.line: May's family said their son is intense. Be careful, Brendan.

dialogue.speaker: MOM (if May)
dialogue.line: Brendan's family said their son is intense. Be careful, May.

scenes.rawBody:
# Scene: Clock and the Neighbor

## Context
Player sets the wall clock, then visits the rival's house. Kael introduces himself with aggressive confidence and mentions "the program" he escaped. Replaces clock tutorial and rival house intro.

## Characters
- MOM — sends player to meet neighbor
- KAEL — rival, first appearance
- KAEL_MOM — brief, off-screen mention

## Dialogue

| Speaker | Line | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| MOM | Set the clock, dear. Time only moves forward if we tell it to. | thematic |
| MOM | Our neighbors have a boy your age. Kael. Be polite. | |
| KAEL | You the import from Johto? Heard your family ran from the coast. | confrontational |
| PLAYER | | silent |
| KAEL | Don't flinch. I left something worse than a bad town. | Syndicate hint |
| KAEL | They call it training. I call it branding. | shows wrist later |
| KAEL | Professor Birch is outside Route 101. Probably dying of boredom. Or of something else. | pushes player out |
| KAEL | Beat me when you're worth measuring. | rivalry declared |
| MOM (if Brendan) | May's family said their son is intense. Be careful, Brendan. | gender branch |
| MOM (if May) | Brendan's family said their son is intense. Be careful, May. | gender branch |

## Story flags / triggers
- Sets VAR_LITTLEROOT_INTRO_STATE = 2 when clock set
- Sets FLAG_MET_KAEL = 1 after rival house visit
- Unlocks: Route 101 north exit

## Implementation notes
Clock UI tutorial unchanged. Rival sprite in bedroom or hallway. Kael dialogue differs slightly if player chose same starter type later (retroactive patch in act1-04).

scenes.title: Route 101 — Birch and the Shaking Grass

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: Help! My data! My— the specimen is wrong!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Poochyena twitches in perfect intervals, like a metronome.

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: In the bag! Quick! Take a Pokémon and fight!

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: You did it. Its shadow stayed when it fled. That isn't normal.

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: I'm Birch. Officially I study ecosystems. Unofficially I study what's eating them.

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: Come to my lab in Littleroot. I'll register your partner.

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: And listen— if anyone in a white mask asks about Johto bells, lie.

dialogue.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue.line: silent

scenes.rawBody:
# Scene: Route 101 — Birch and the Shaking Grass

## Context
Professor Birch is chased by a zigzagging Poochyena that moves wrong — eyes flat, no breath fog. Player takes starter from Birch's bag. Replaces vanilla Route 101 rescue. First battle is mandatory.

## Characters
- BIRCH — professor, panicked then grateful
- PLAYER — silent
- NARRATOR — Poochyena description

## Dialogue

| Speaker | Line | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| BIRCH | Help! My data! My— the specimen is wrong! | |
| NARRATOR | The Poochyena twitches in perfect intervals, like a metronome. | horror |
| BIRCH | In the bag! Quick! Take a Pokémon and fight! | starter choice |
| BIRCH | You did it. Its shadow stayed when it fled. That isn't normal. | post-battle |
| BIRCH | I'm Birch. Officially I study ecosystems. Unofficially I study what's eating them. | |
| BIRCH | Come to my lab in Littleroot. I'll register your partner. | |
| BIRCH | And listen— if anyone in a white mask asks about Johto bells, lie. | Syndicate foreshadow |
| PLAYER | | silent |

## Story flags / triggers
- Sets VAR_STARTER_CHOICE = 1/2/3 by pick
- Sets FLAG_BIRCH_RESCUE_COMPLETE = 1
- Unlocks: Littleroot Lab registration, Route 103

## Implementation notes
Starter bag UI. Modified Poochyena AI aggressive. After battle, Poochyena flees north instead of KO fade. Birch follows to lab for dex handoff scene (vanilla lab script).

scenes.title: Route 103 — First Measurement

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: Hold it. I need a number before the world gets noisy.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: Your stance is sloppy. Your Pokémon believes in you anyway. That's annoying.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: …Tch. Fine. You're not hollow.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: Laugh while you can. The Syndicate counts everything.

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: Kael! I said friendly research, not gladiator cosplay.

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: Both of you: Route 102, then Petalburg. Norman wants to meet our new trainer.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: Norman's real. Unlike the masks.

dialogue.speaker: BIRCH
dialogue.line: Player, don't lose to him twice in one week.

dialogue.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue.line: silent

scenes.rawBody:
# Scene: Route 103 — First Measurement

## Context
Kael blocks the path to Oldale, calling this a "baseline reading." First rival battle. Birch arrives after and sends both kids on a dex errand to Route 102. Replaces vanilla Route 103 rival fight.

## Characters
- KAEL — rival battle
- BIRCH — post-battle exposition
- PLAYER — silent

## Dialogue

| Speaker | Line | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| KAEL | Hold it. I need a number before the world gets noisy. | DBZ power-scanner vibe |
| KAEL | Your stance is sloppy. Your Pokémon believes in you anyway. That's annoying. | |
| KAEL | …Tch. Fine. You're not hollow. | if player wins |
| KAEL | Laugh while you can. The Syndicate counts everything. | |
| BIRCH | Kael! I said friendly research, not gladiator cosplay. | arrives after battle |
| BIRCH | Both of you: Route 102, then Petalburg. Norman wants to meet our new trainer. | |
| KAEL | Norman's real. Unlike the masks. | |
| BIRCH | Player, don't lose to him twice in one week. | light humor |
| PLAYER | | silent |

## Story flags / triggers
- Sets FLAG_RIVAL_ROUTE103 = 1
- Unlocks: Route 102, Oldale Town access

## Implementation notes
Rival party: starter + Lv2 Poochyena. Birch cutscene spawns after win/loss. Kael walks toward Oldale north gate.

scenes.title: Petalburg — Norman and Wally

dialogue.speaker: NORMAN
dialogue.line: So you're the one my friend trusted Hoenn with. Stand straight.

dialogue.speaker: NORMAN
dialogue.line: I won't battle you today. Badges aren't medals. They're answers to hard questions.

dialogue.speaker: WALLY
dialogue.line: Um… could you help me? I hear something in the grass… crying backward.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Wally throws a Poké Ball. Ralts lands, then stares at empty air behind you.

dialogue.speaker: NORMAN
dialogue.line: Good. Sensitivity is a weapon if you train it.

dialogue.speaker: NORMAN
dialogue.line: Player, Route 102 next. Petalburg Woods has been… disturbed.

dialogue.speaker: NORMAN
dialogue.line: Kael passed through scowling. Tell him the Gym doesn't fix what's broken inside.

dialogue.speaker: WALLY
dialogue.line: I'll get strong. For my family. For whatever is watching.

dialogue.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue.line: silent

scenes.rawBody:
# Scene: Petalburg — Norman and Wally

## Context
Norman greets the player as an old friend of their parent and refuses the Gym battle until "foundation is laid." Wally catches a Ralts with player's help — Ralts shivers at something unseen. Replaces Wally catching tutorial and Norman dialogue.

## Characters
- NORMAN — mentor figure, Gym Leader
- WALLY — timid boy, first catch
- KAEL — optional background cameo leaving city
- PLAYER — silent

## Dialogue

| Speaker | Line | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| NORMAN | So you're the one my friend trusted Hoenn with. Stand straight. | martial mentor |
| NORMAN | I won't battle you today. Badges aren't medals. They're answers to hard questions. | |
| WALLY | Um… could you help me? I hear something in the grass… crying backward. | horror hint |
| NARRATOR | Wally throws a Poké Ball. Ralts lands, then stares at empty air behind you. | |
| NORMAN | Good. Sensitivity is a weapon if you train it. | to Wally |
| NORMAN | Player, Route 102 next. Petalburg Woods has been… disturbed. | |
| NORMAN | Kael passed through scowling. Tell him the Gym doesn't fix what's broken inside. | if Kael seen |
| WALLY | I'll get strong. For my family. For whatever is watching. | |
| PLAYER | | silent |

## Story flags / triggers
- Sets VAR_PETALBURG_STATE = 1
- Sets FLAG_WALLY_RALTS = 1
- Unlocks: Petalburg Woods, Gym interior (decline battle)

## Implementation notes
Wally battle tutorial optional skip. Ralts given to Wally via script. Norman blocks gym doors with "Come back with one badge."

files.name: 00-overview.md
files.content:
# Pokémon Emerald: The Hollow Crown

## Elevator pitch
You arrive in Hoenn as ancient Johto relics begin surfacing beneath the region's soil. A corporate cult called the Null Syndicate hunts those relics to feed a sleeping horror called the Stillness, and your rival Kael knows their secrets because he once wore their uniform. Train like a fighter, seal what should never wake, and climb from Littleroot to Champion before Sovereign Null reshapes the world into silence.

## Themes
- Power earned through discipline and bonds, not stolen life force
- History buried twice: Johto bells and Hoenn legends as one chained truth
- Horror of erasure — bodies, names, and memory hollowed out for "perfection"

## Protagonist
Default name follows player choice (Brendan/May). Backstory: family relocated from Olivine after your parent witnessed a "hollow ship" dredging the sea floor. Starting goal: settle in Littleroot, win badges, prove yourself to Gym Leader Norman (your father's friend). End goal: break the Null Syndicate's crown seals, restore the Brass Bell trinity, and deny Sovereign Null the Stillness.

## Rival
**Kael** — sharp, proud, obsessed with surpassing you. Early: cocky ex-trainer who left the Syndicate's youth program and hides a branded mark on his wrist. Mid: forced to cooperate when the Syndicate targets his sister in Slateport; grudging respect. Late: stands with you at Sootopolis, admits fear is not weakness, fights Null's lieutenant while you face the sovereign.

## Antagonist / faction
**The Null Syndicate** — merger of Devon poachers, renegade Silph tech, and Johto ruin delvers. Leader: **Sovereign Null** (humanoid, porcelain mask, Frieza-cold politeness), believes the Stillness will grant immortal "perfect silence" by consuming legendary essence. Player opposes them because they hollow Pokémon and people into empty vessels. **Team Magma and Team Aqua are fully replaced** — no weather teams; Mt Chimney and Seafloor Cavern are Syndicate excavation sites.

## Legendaries
Groudon and Kyogre appear as **Seal Keepers** bound at Sootopolis — required for plot climax but not catch-required. Rayquaza descends as **Sky Arbiter** when the Brass Bell shards resonate; story resolution uses Rayquaza to re-chain the Stillness, not a mandatory capture. Optional: player may battle/catch after story flag STILLNESS_SEALED.

## Act structure

| Act | Region progress | Main conflict |
|-----|-----------------|----------------|
| 1 | Littleroot → Stone Badge | Relocation, first Syndicate sighting, Devon theft |
| 2 | → Knuckle Badge | Museum heist, power-scanner plot, Mt Chimney breach |
| 3 | → Dynamo Badge | Norman's truth, Fortree spy, Mt Pyre bell shard |
| 4 | → Heat Badge | Lilycove hideout, Mossdeep launch, cavern descent |
| 5 | → Feather Badge | Sootopolis cataclysm, legendary re-sealing |
| 6 | → Champion | Victory Road trials, Elite Four, homecoming |

## New named NPCs
| Name | Role | First scene file |
|------|------|------------------|
| Kael | Rival, ex-Syndicate | act1-02-clock-rival |
| Sovereign Null | Antagonist | act2-06-mt-chimney-clash |
| Elara Voss | Johto archaeologist | act2-02-slateport-museum |
| Harrow | Null lieutenant | act2-06-mt-chimney-clash |
| Sister Mira | Kael's sister, Slateport nurse | act2-02-slateport-museum |
| Captain Jori | S.S. Tidal ally | act3-06-mossdeep-planning |
| The Stillness | Eldritch sealed entity | act3-04-mt-pyre-lore |

## Tone & content rating
PG-13. Martial arts enthusiasm, cosmic horror undertones (hollow eyes, whispering ruins, body-husk imagery without gore). No explicit content. Frightening scenes use atmosphere and implication, not splatter.

# Scene: Arrival in Littleroot

## Context
The moving truck arrives in Littleroot after the family fled Olivine's docks. Mom hides her anxiety behind warmth; a distant siren wails once and stops. Replaces vanilla truck intro and house entry. Player has no Pokémon yet.

## Characters
- MOM — welcomes player, hints at why they left Johto
- PLAYER — silent protagonist
- NARRATOR — optional truck bump

## Dialogue

| Speaker | Line | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| NARRATOR | The truck shudders over red Hoenn soil. In the mirror of a puddle, your reflection blinks a half-second late. | horror beat, subtle |
| MOM | We're home, sweetie. Littleroot Town. Fresh air. Fresh start. | warm, tired |
| MOM | Your father asked Norman to watch over us. That means you train hard, but not foolishly. | foreshadow Norman |
| MOM | I know Olivine still feels close. Forget the hollow ships. Forget the bells that rang underwater. | Johto hook |
| PLAYER | | silent |
| MOM | Go on inside. I'll unpack. And if you hear whispering from the empty room— | pause |
| MOM | —that's just the house settling. | Mom lies kindly |
| MOM | Welcome to our new life. | sets tone |

## Story flags / triggers
- Sets VAR_LITTLEROOT_INTRO_STATE = 1 when complete
- Unlocks: house interior, clock scene

## Implementation notes
Play truck arrival animation. Fade to player bedroom. Set global flag MOVED_TO_HOENN. Optional: one-frame static overlay on puddle reflection.

# Scene: Petalburg — Norman and Wally

Norman greets the player as an old friend of their parent and refuses the Gym battle until "foundation is laid." Wally catches a Ralts with player's help — Ralts shivers at something unseen. Replaces Wally catching tutorial and Norman dialogue.
